name: taocode-plugins
label: TaoCode Plugins
description: Official plugin registry for TaoCode — skills and MCP servers installable from the in-app /plugins.

plugins.label: TAO Subnet Explorer
plugins.summary: Inspect Bittensor subnets from a coding session — metagraph, validators, stake weights, consensus, and emission split. Read-only.

plugins.label: Chutes Gateway Kit
plugins.summary: Inspect TAO inference gateways — Chutes (SN64) / Targon (SN4) balance, triage 402 'payment required', and explain hotkey funding.

plugins.label: TAO Wallet Guard
plugins.summary: Guardrails for Bittensor wallet actions — preview transfers and staking, then require explicit confirmation before any signature.

plugins.label: Conventional Commits
plugins.summary: Write clear, consistent commit messages following the Conventional Commits spec.
